macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Scientists Develop 'Periodic Table' Framework for Multimodal AI
items.summary: Emory University physicists created a unifying mathematical framework likened to a 'periodic table' for AI, enabling better algorithm design for multimodal systems that handle text, images, and more by compressing data while preserving predictive elements. The approach promises more efficient, accurate AI with less data and computing power.

items.title: University of Wisconsin Researchers Advance AI in Medical Research
items.summary: AI and machine learning are transforming medical research at UW School of Medicine, with new algorithms untangling cellular mechanisms in neurodegenerative diseases like Alzheimer’s and autism, computer vision for microscopic analysis, and models for earlier ovarian cancer detection from health records.
items.source: University of Wisconsin School of Medicine and Public Health

items.title: YorkU-Led Machine Learning Study Reveals Immune System Patterns for Personalized Medicine
items.summary: A new machine learning analysis of immune system data identifies core differences between groups, enabling virtual patient models that could unlock personalized medicine approaches, published as a pre-print in the Journal Patterns.

items.title: EMA Expands AI-Powered Scientific Explorer Tool for Drug Approvals
items.summary: The European Medicines Agency has extended its AI-enabled knowledge mining tool, Scientific Explorer, to help regulators search public assessment reports for human medicine marketing authorizations, with functionality available as of March 2026.

items.title: AI-Driven Shifts Reshape Software Development Amid Funding Frenzy
items.summary: Software development sees rapid AI integration for code generation and threat detection, fueled by massive VC investments in AI startups, alongside rising cybersecurity risks and calls for 'secure by design' principles as of March 4, 2026.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Capcom Spotlight Event Scheduled for March 5, 2026
items.summary: Capcom is hosting a digital Spotlight event today at 2 PM PST to present the latest news on highly anticipated upcoming titles. The broadcast is planned to be approximately 35 minutes long.

items.title: Marathon Extraction FPS Launches Today
items.summary: Bungie's new extraction-based first-person shooter Marathon officially releases today, March 5, 2026. The game recently completed a Server Slam beta test that showcased various weapons and gameplay mechanics.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Apple Launches $599 MacBook Neo Targeting Budget PC Market
items.summary: Apple announced the MacBook Neo, a new affordable laptop priced at $599 aimed at budget-conscious shoppers and the PC market. The launch was highlighted in Bloomberg Technology coverage discussing tech stock rebounds.

items.title: BYD Announces Major Tech Event for March 5 with 1,000 km EV Range and Flash Charging
items.summary: BYD confirmed a technology launch event on March 5, 2026, showcasing pure EVs with over 1,000 km CLTC range, Megawatt Flash Charging 2.0, next-gen DM 6.0 hybrid platform, and DiPilot 5.0 driver assistance system.

items.title: Trump Secures Big Tech Pledge to Fund Data Center Power Costs
items.summary: President Trump unveiled a 'Ratepayer Protection Pledge' with Google, Meta, Amazon, and others to cover electricity generation costs for data centers, preventing rises in household power bills amid surging demand.

items.title: Broadcom Expects Revenue Beat Driven by Custom Chip Demand
items.summary: Broadcom anticipates revenue above estimates, fueled by demand for custom chips amid ongoing tech sector developments.

items.title: Intel CEO Reconsiders Fate of New Manufacturing Technology
items.summary: Intel's CEO is rethinking the chipmaker's new manufacturing tech, as stated by the CFO, amid strategic shifts in the semiconductor industry.
